name: Zerodha Trading Platform — Full Observability Stack
scenario: Add distributed tracing to the complete Zerodha trading platform. Every trade request carries a traceId through order-service, market-service, and payment-service. Logs show traceId. Custom spans instrument key business operations. Zipkin shows the full request waterfall.
description: Final Module 15 project: add Micrometer Tracing to all three trading services. Custom spans for DB queries and payment processing. MDC with userId. AuditFilter for every request. Zipkin visualizes the complete trade flow.

core.description: Add Micrometer Tracing dependencies to all three services (micrometer-tracing-bridge-brave, zipkin-reporter-brave, feign-micrometer). Configure endpoint and sampling in application.properties for each.
Logging pattern includes [traceId] in all three services. Console pattern: `%d{HH:mm:ss.SSS} [%X{traceId}] [${spring.application.name}] %-5level %msg%n`.

Custom spans: (1) `order-service.TradeService`: span 'trade-execution' tagged with userId, symbol, qty. (2) `market-service.StockController`: span 'stock-quote-db' with symbol and elapsed_ms tags. (3) `payment-service.PaymentController`: span 'payment-gateway-call' with transactionId tag.
`UserContextFilter` in order-service: reads X-User-Id header → MDC.put('userId'). Feign RequestInterceptor forwards X-User-Id to market-service and payment-service. Logging pattern includes userId.
`AuditFilter` in order-service: logs [AUDIT-IN] request method/URI/traceId/userId before, [AUDIT-OUT] method/URI/status/duration after.
@SpringBootTest tests (3): Tracer injected and functional, TradeService custom span created with correct name, AuditFilter logs contain traceId. All 3 pass.

bonus.description: Add span error marking: in PaymentController, if payment amount > 1,000,000 (10L INR), mark span as error with tag 'error.reason=amount-limit-exceeded' and throw PaymentLimitException.

Create a TraceSearchController in order-service: POST /admin/trace/search {traceId} that returns the count of log lines containing that traceId from an in-memory audit log. Demonstrates log correlation.
Implement profile-specific sampling: dev application-dev.properties = 1.0, prod = 0.05. @SpringBootTest with @ActiveProfiles('dev') verifies sampling.probability=1.0.

data_to_use:
Test trade:
userId=U01, symbol=TCS, qty=10
traceId: auto-generated UUID by Micrometer Tracing

Expected Zipkin waterfall:
order-service: trade-execution [0→200ms]
  feign→market-service: [5→120ms]
    market-service: stock-quote-db [5→120ms]
      stock-db: [10→115ms]
  feign→payment-service: [130→195ms]
    payment-service: payment-gateway-call [130→195ms]

Expected log correlation (all with same traceId):
[abc123] [order-service]  INFO  Trade received for U01/TCS/10
[abc123] [market-service] INFO  Fetching quote for TCS
[abc123] [payment-service] INFO  Processing payment ₹38900
example_output:
# Start Zipkin:
docker run -d -p 9411:9411 openzipkin/zipkin

# Start all three services + POST /api/trades

# Logs (all three services, same traceId!):
10:15:32.001 [abc123defgh] [order-service]   INFO  [AUDIT-IN]  POST /api/trades userId=U01
10:15:32.005 [abc123defgh] [order-service]   INFO  trade-execution span started: TCS/10
10:15:32.010 [abc123defgh] [market-service]  INFO  GET /api/stocks/TCS/quote received
10:15:32.015 [abc123defgh] [market-service]  INFO  stock-quote-db: querying TCS
10:15:32.115 [abc123defgh] [market-service]  INFO  stock-quote-db: complete, 100ms
10:15:32.130 [abc123defgh] [payment-service] INFO  POST /api/payments received
10:15:32.195 [abc123defgh] [payment-service] INFO  payment-gateway-call: ₹38900 processed
10:15:32.200 [abc123defgh] [order-service]   INFO  [AUDIT-OUT] POST /api/trades 201 199ms

# Tests:
✓ tracer_isAvailable
✓ tradeService_createsSpanWithCorrectName
✓ auditFilter_logsTraceId
ai_policy_explanation: Limited to 5 hints. feign-micrometer is CRITICAL — without it, market-service and payment-service start new traces instead of continuing order-service's trace. span.end() must be in finally block — never skip. logging.pattern.console=%d [%X{traceId}] — the %X{...} is Logback MDC syntax. MDC.put in filter BEFORE chain.doFilter; MDC.remove in finally.
submission_instructions: All three services in GitHub (separate directories). Zipkin screenshot showing trade waterfall. All 3 tests pass. Logs showing same traceId across all three service log files.
tips_for_success: feign-micrometer: add to order-service pom — without it, cross-service trace propagation doesn't work
Start Zipkin first: docker run -d -p 9411:9411 openzipkin/zipkin
span.end() in finally: NEVER skip — open spans corrupt Zipkin timelines
MDC.remove() in finally: prevents thread pool contamination (next request gets stale userId)
Zipkin search: search by service name, find highest-duration trace, drill in
concepts_reinforced: TraceId propagation across services via Feign B3 headers
MDC (Mapped Diagnostic Context) for structured logging
Zipkin waterfall reading for latency diagnosis
